title: psoralea incana
intro: Psoralea incana, also known as the Indian breadroot or silver lespedeza, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its coumarin and isoflavone content. The health benefits of Psoralea incana include its ability to support bone health, reduce inflammation, and promote cardiovascular well-being. In herbal preparations, Psoralea incana can be consumed as a tea or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
